latHint: Think a repetitive daily routine - not boring through rock.
pivHint: Tunnels are bored with a giant DRILL - but the 'daily DRILL' at work is also called the daily what?
winText: The daily routine. DRILL was the pivot - tunnel boring to the daily GRIND.
lossText: GRIND - a repetitive routine. DRILL was the pivot: the tunnel DRILL to the daily GRIND.
